global_description: A large seabird with a slender, elongated body and long, pointed wings. It has a predominantly black plumage with a glossy sheen, and a distinctive red gular pouch on males. The tail is deeply forked, and the beak is long and hooked.

part_details.wings: Long, narrow, and pointed with glossy black feathers.
part_details.tail: Deeply forked with long, tapering black feathers.
part_details.gular_pouch: Bright red, inflatable sac located on the throat of males.
part_details.beak: Long, slender, and hooked, pale in color.
part_details.body: Slender and elongated with a glossy black sheen.

spatial_relations: The long pointed wings extend laterally from the slender body.
The deeply forked tail is positioned at the rear of the body.
The red gular pouch is located on the throat, beneath the beak.
The long hooked beak protrudes from the front of the head.
